design_notes: ‘Cloud’ and ‘Chip’ tempt between Technology and natural or physical categories but belong only to Technology. ‘Buff’ and ‘Azure’ look like just colors but have strong alternate meanings (buff as a person or texture, azure as a place name or concept). ‘Swing’ and ‘Rollercoaster’ both imply movement but classify into Jazz and Track categories, respectively, creating overlap. The hard category leverages polysemy of colors with dual meanings for ambiguity.
